title: openclaw/openclaw
friendlyTitle: OpenClaw is a personal AI assistant you can run yourself
summary: OpenClaw is an open-source personal AI assistant that runs across operating systems and messaging platforms, with gateway-style integrations for chat channels, local surfaces, skills, and automation.
friendlySummary: OpenClaw is an open-source assistant that can work across devices and messaging apps.
whyItMatters: Developers can use it as a reference architecture for always-on personal agents that connect to messaging apps and local workflows. It is also useful for comparing gateway, skill, and daemon patterns in modern assistant stacks.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Builders can study it to understand how personal AI assistants connect to chat apps, tools, and local systems.
howItsUseful: Developers can use it as a reference architecture for always-on personal agents that connect to messaging apps and local workflows. It is also useful for comparing gateway, skill, and daemon patterns in modern assistant stacks.
friendlyHowItsUseful: Builders can study it to understand how personal AI assistants connect to chat apps, tools, and local systems.
